meaning: adj.不宜于呼吸的,不宜吸入的
examples: So much smoke was given off by the burning coal that the air soon became unbreathable .
Here in the thicker medium of the unbreathable Fantoman atmosphere, great Breetai gazed down on a place out of memory.
The above image was taken seconds after liftoff as the massive orbiter and six astronauts began a climb to a height where the atmosphere is so thin it is unbreathable.
